race.description: Barry Vandenbergh Kembla Grange Stayers Cup Handicap (Bm68)
race.comment: Open race that feels more like a metro midweeker. DOLCE DIOR (4) brings that good city form to the table. Led and looked the winner last start until collared by GOOFINATOR over 2110m at Warwick Farm. Meets him 2.5kgs better today for a long neck defeat. Unproven at 2400m is the only query, but she looks like she will get it. No fears at the trip for GOOFINATOR (1) who has won two on the trot and also tasted success last prep at Wagga over 3200m. The handicapper hasn't missed him this time but he is racing too well to dismiss. MR FABULOUS (2) convincingly won a BM64 over this course and distance two runs ago then chased GOOFINATOR and co home at the Farm more recently. Big chance back out to this trip. THINK I DO (10) is racing in great heart. New to today's journey but deserves plenty of thought. Likely leader DORADUS (5) has been going well in town and will look the winner at some stage.
